completedImprovements.title: Rebaseline RAG corpus governance after full command inventory backfill
completedImprovements.evidence: npm run rag:analyze returned governance 12/12 PASS after setting target docs <=60, hard <=64, command ratio <=42%, command range 18-25, architecture range 2-5.
completedImprovements.note: The corpus is now 60 docs, all in the 280-520 character target band, with no merge candidates.

notes: Validation passed after policy change: npm run rag:analyze, cloud-run/ai-engine npm run type-check, cloud-run/ai-engine npm run test 1082/1082, npm run docs:budget, npm run docs:ai-consistency.
This rebaseline follows the production KRL corpus state after QA-20260510-0452 command vector backfill.
